docs.title: DLMC Guides
docs.text: Reference guides and how-tos from the Digital Learning & Media Center — practical, step-by-step documentation for the tools and workflows we use every day.

docs.title: What's here
docs.text:
• Video Production — capturing, editing, and exporting video, including Premiere Pro workflows.

More sections will be added as guides are written. If you can't find what you're looking for, reach out to the DLMC team.

docs.title: Adding Captions in Premiere
docs.text: Quick reference for adding closed captions to a Premiere Pro project.

docs.title: Step 1: Import your transcript
docs.text: Open the Text panel (Window > Text) and click Transcript.

docs.title: Step 2: Sync captions to timeline
docs.text:
Once transcribed, click Create Captions to generate a caption track.

!!! tip If auto-sync drifts, right-click the caption track and select Re-sync Captions.

!!! warning Exported captions default to .srt — confirm the LMS/platform you're uploading to actually supports that format.
